About Me

I am a data analyst with a focus on sports analytics, particularly football and MMA.

My work includes:

  • Data cleaning and feature engineering
  • Predictive modeling
  • Performance analysis using play-by-play data

Tools & Skills

  • Python / R
  • SQL
  • Sports data (NFLfastR, PFF, etc.)
  • Data visualization
